MAP.COMMENT: Map the request to Transaction, Originator, Applicants, and Assetscanonical documents

MAP.NAME: %/AppDetailResponse/CurrentStatus/Category/Code% <=2
MAP.COMMENT: If in initial app entry ShowCreditDecision to 0
Map the originator name to the AppDetailResponse

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: add contact name (TODO: Needs to change to information stored in custom field once we can retrieve custom fields)

MAP.COMMENT: Temporary Address Mapping - Waiting for Cyence Fix
Map Canonical to AppDetailsResponse - Top List
Map Canonical to AppDetailsResponse - Second List
Set the NewUsedFlag to 1 - EFW Value
Set the NewUsedFlag to 0 - EFW Value
